mapper.select: SELECT nh.hid, nh.title, nh.`version`, nh.article, nt.tname AS typeName, nh.page_views, TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, nh.update_time, NOW()) AS pastHour, nu.username AS username, nu.nick_name AS author FROM news_headline AS nh LEFT JOIN news_user AS nu ON nh.publisher = nu.uid LEFT JOIN news_type AS nt ON nh.type = nt.tid WHERE nh.hid = #{hid}
